CS110: Winter 2022

Intro to Computer Programming with Python

CS110: Winter 2022

  • Syllabus
  • Schedule
  • Assignments
  • Calendar
  • Campuswire

Schedule

Note: This schedule is subject to change (as needed). In addition, unless otherwise indicated, tutorials are always due on Wednesday at 11:59PM and homework is always due on Friday at 11:59PM.

Week Lesson Topic Due
Week 1 01/03/22 Mon, 01/03 Lesson 0 Introduction
  • Intro to the course
01/05/22 Wed, 01/05 Lesson 1 Intro to Hardware and Software
  • What is hardware?
  • What is software?
  • What are some "real world" analogies?
01/07/22 Fri, 01/07 Lesson 2 Writing Programs
  • Programs, operators, and data types
HW0 Sign up for a Tutorial Session
Week 2 01/10/22 Mon, 01/10 Lesson 3 Variables & Functions
  • Variables...what are they good for?
  • Using built-in Functions
01/12/22 Wed, 01/12 Lesson 4 Lists & Tuples
  • List, tuples, and other strange data types
Tutorial 1 Get Python Running
01/14/22 Fri, 01/14 Lesson 5 Zooming in on Functions
  • Using functions
  • Creating your own functions
  • Defining versus invoking functions
HW1 Installation & Introductory Exercises
Week 3 01/19/22 Wed, 01/19 Lesson 6 Creating Your Own Functions: Part 2
  • More function practice
Tutorial 2 Practice with Functions
01/21/22 Fri, 01/21 Lesson 7 Modules and Variable Scope
  • Creating modules
  • Global and local variables
HW2 Intro to Tkinter

Department of Computer Science, Northwestern University.

Special thanks to Prof. Sarah Van Wart who first developed this curriculum.
